v16_transition_probability.methodology: Monthly V16 states mapped to GROWTH/STRESS/CRISIS groups. Forward transition = worst V16 group reached within horizon.

CREDIT_BEARISH__BUSINESS_BEARISH__FED_PI.entry_zone: -15% bis -20% vom Hoch (aggressiver weil Fed kommt)

overall_assessment.verdict: WARNING — Cascade Speed CASCADE. 3 cycles transitioning. Defensive positioning recommended. WATCH: CREDIT, COMMODITY, CHINA_CREDIT, BUSINESS, FED_RATES, EARNINGS, TRADE extended beyond median duration.
